data.title: Distributed System
data.description: Google.com runs on a distributed system architecture that spans numerous data centers around the world.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes load balancing, data replication, and fault tolerance across server farms.

data.title: Google File System
data.description: A proprietary file storage system that supports Google's large-scale data processing requirements.
data.technical_spec: Optimized for large-scale data storage and retrieval with redundancy.

data.title: Bigtable
data.description: A distributed storage system for managing structured data that supports Google services.
data.technical_spec: Stores data across thousands of commodity servers, providing scalability.

data.title: MapReduce
data.description: A programming model for processing large data sets with a distributed algorithm.
data.technical_spec: Facilitates data processing across large clusters of computers using parallel processing.

data.title: Borg
data.description: A cluster management system used to manage Google's massive infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Handles resource allocation and job scheduling across thousands of servers.
